strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise with event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
Hands-on experience with event streaming and real-time systems (e.g., Dunnhumby media, WatchUp)
Demonstrated AI-agent infrastructure contribution (e.g., MCP frameworks, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
concerns: Limited fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, regulatory compliance)
No direct experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Minimal exposure to production ML systems with financial consequences (e.g., real-time credit risk, trade decisioning)
response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and event-driven system experience, including contributions to agentic-AI infrastructure, which aligns with the technical depth required for the role. However, his lack of fintech-specific background (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance) and limited experience scaling engineering teams to the required size are notable gaps. His hands-on distributed systems work and AI-agent contributions are positives, but the fintech domain remains a significant unproven area.
